name: Non-Fungible Token (NFT)
description: A collection of unique tokens with sequential ids. Use for: collectibles, art, memberships, badges, passes, tickets, proof-of-ownership. Owner mints tokens (each gets an auto-incrementing id) under a shared collection URI.
useFor: collectibles, art, memberships, badges, passes, tickets

methods.name: mint
methods.description: Mint a new token to an address; returns the new token id. OWNER ONLY.

methods.name: owner_of
methods.description: Who owns a given token id.

methods.name: balance
methods.description: How many tokens an address owns.

methods.name: transfer
methods.description: Transfer one token to another address (caller must own it).
